mapper.select: /* 시스템 설정: 충전 한도 조회 */ SELECT SYS_SET_MIN_CHRG_AMT AS minChrgAmt, SYS_SET_MAX_CHRG_AMT AS maxChrgAmt FROM SYSTEM_SETTING LIMIT 1
/* 시스템 설정: 경매 정책 조회 */ SELECT SYS_SET_AUC_EXT_MIN AS aucExtMin, SYS_SET_AUC_EXT_MAX_CNT AS aucExtMaxCnt, SYS_SET_MIN_BID_UNIT AS minBidUnit FROM SYSTEM_SETTING LIMIT 1
